name: EmojiPickerProps
description:
An emoji picker panel — search, categories, and a virtualized grid — built
on the headless [frimousse](https://frimousse.liveblocks.io) engine with
dotUI chrome. Drop it inside a React Aria `Popover` for the usual
trigger-and-overlay pattern. `onEmojiSelect` fires with the chosen emoji.

onEmojiSelect.detailedType:
| ((emoji: { emoji: string; label: string }) => void)
| undefined
onEmojiSelect.description: A callback invoked when an emoji is selected.

locale.description: The locale of the emoji picker.

skinTone.description: The skin tone of the emoji picker.

columns.description: The number of columns in the list.

emojiVersion.description:
Which {@link https://emojipedia.org/emoji-versions Emoji version} to use,
to manually control which emojis are visible regardless of the current
browser's supported Emoji versions.
emojiVersion.default: The most recent version supported by the current browser

emojibaseUrl.description:
The base URL of where the {@link https://emojibase.dev/docs/datasets/ Emojibase data}
should be fetched from, used as follows: `${emojibaseUrl}/${locale}/${file}.json`.
(e.g. `${emojibaseUrl}/en/data.json`).

The URL can be set to another CDN hosting the {@link https://www.npmjs.com/package/emojibase-data `emojibase-data`}
package and its raw JSON files, or to a self-hosted location. When self-hosting
with a single locale (e.g. `en`), only that locale's directory needs to be hosted
instead of the entire package.

sticky.description: Whether the category headers should be sticky.
